description: CompositionGreen sweater made of 80% acrylic and 20% wool knit, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed V-neck, branding in rubber print on left chest and a ribbed hemFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetWarm iron do not iron on decorationsPerfect for those men with style, this flat knit sweater from spykar is a must buy. The ribbed cuffs and hem sit snug, while the rubber print adds a fashionable twist. Layer this sweater with fitting tees, jeans and sports shoes when the weather changes for the cooler.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18& rdquo
